items.summary: Create a dedicated Settings page (frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx) accessible from the app navigation. The page must contain clearly separated sections: Language, Version, Admin, About App, and Download App.

In the Settings page Language section, embed the existing LanguageSelector component (frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector.tsx) so users can switch the app language from within Settings. Remove or hide the LanguageSelector from any other location where it currently appears (e.g., top navigation bar) to avoid duplication.

In the Settings page Version section, display the current app version string (e.g., 'v1.0.0' or a hardcoded build version) as a read-only informational row with a label 'App Version' and the version value.

In the Settings page Admin section, show an 'Admin Dashboard' navigation link that is only visible to users for whom useIsCallerAdmin returns true. Unauthenticated users or non-admin users must not see this row. Clicking the link navigates to the existing Admin Dashboard page.

In the Settings page About App section, display static informational content about the Mediatube app: app name, a short description, links to the Privacy Policy and Copyright Policy pages, and contact/support info. This section must be visible to all users.

In the Settings page Download App section, display a button or link that navigates to the existing Download App page (frontend/src/pages/DownloadAppPage.tsx). The row should show platform icons (Android/iOS) and a label 'Download Mediatube App'.

Register the Settings page as a new route (e.g., /settings) in the TanStack Router route tree in frontend/src/App.tsx, and add a 'Settings' entry to the sidebar navigation in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx and to the bottom navigation bar in frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx using an appropriate settings icon.
